strategy: Round 1 she puts an unremovable Invulnerability aura (-200% Brace) on herself that heavily cuts your damage. Do not waste turns trying to strip it; stack blades and pierce and wait for it to expire, then hit.
She resists 45% to every school, so pile on armor piercing rather than chasing a weakness.
Killing her Aberrant Pinguoin makes her summon Aberrant Maxine and cast Frenzy, so expect a fresh minion and a damage spike.
Set up a big pierced hit for when the aura drops; funnel blades to one hitter.
cheatNotes: Round 1 she casts an Invulnerability -200% Brace aura that sharply reduces incoming damage. Set up and hit once it expires.
Once all her minions are defeated she summons Aberrant Maxine. Killing the Pinguoin just brings a replacement.
She also Frenzies herself on that turn and recasts Frenzy every 4 rounds, spiking her damage - shield up.
